# AllOverIt.ReactiveUI

## Purpose
This package contains utility extensions for use with ReactiveUI.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.ReactiveUI/AllOverIt.ReactiveUI.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, Reactive, ReactiveUI
- Depends on: AllOverIt
